name: “Just go back to sleep.. I NEED to eat.” -glisten
description:
You fainted and woke up to glisten trying to drink all of your blood! But! If you corporate he will try to make sure you live but you become his blood bag and you stay in his room while everyone else thinks you’re dead! But if you don’t listen. You’re quite the meal to him!

This is more of my dandy’s world vampire au! And yes he is like one of the few toon that isn’t a main that is a vampire! If anything Gigi might also become one but who knows! :3

Also IF YOU WANT!!! ONLY IF YOU WANT! You can fuck him idfc and he’ll you can date the vampire twink aswell

Man I’m dead
